commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 Jul

NYSE maintains dominant liquidity leadership with the lowest Amihud ratio (0.0015) and tightest Roll spread (1.0585%), reflecting deep order books and minimal price impact. Conversely, London Stock Exchange ranks last with substantially elevated ILLIQ (0.1347) and AR spread (0.8507%), indicating thinner liquidity and wider effective spreads. Nasdaq-100 ranks second but shows notably higher price impact (0.0028 ILLIQ) than NYSE, while continental European exchanges cluster mid-range, with Xetra exhibiting the highest Amihud ratio among top-tier venues.
